title: Poor date handling with Jira Product Discovery
excerpt: We’re using Jira product discovery for our company’s product team. I’m trying to use the Jira integration to sync data, and I’m able to do it! But unfortunately the Project start and Project target fields are coming over…

posts.author: mike.holler.prolaio (Mike Holler)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re using Jira product discovery for our company’s product team. I’m trying to use the Jira integration to sync data, and I’m able to do it! But unfortunately the Project start and Project target fields are coming over differently from other Jira issues.

The tool did not let me sync Project start or Project target in Jira to a date column in Monday. It only lets me choose text columns. This is a problem, because we can’t make a Gantt chart without referencing Monday date columns (it won’t let me target text columns, or formula columns).

image504×888 50.1 KB

Above, you can see the Project start and Project target fields are set to individual days. But when I sync that to a text field in Monday, what I see is:

I’m looking for solutions that let me pull these fields into date columns, and/or how to report a bug or request a feature so that someone sees this issue and fixes it. Can someone help?
